register.title: Kola akaawunti
register.subtitle: Wandiika ebiwandiiko byo okutandikirawo.
register.legalPrefix: By click continue, you agree to our
register.successMessage: Weebale nnyo okuwandiisa. Okukozesa akaawunti yo, kebera e-mail yo era nyiga ku linki ey'okukakasa gye twakuweereza.
register.passwordTooShort: Obubonero buno bulina okuba n'ennukuta ezitakka wansi wa 6.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Enter one of your recovery codes to sign in
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Tukusaba owandiike ennamba entuufu ey'okuzzaawo (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: 6 Nkusaba owandiike ekiwandiiko ekikwata ku bubonero buno.
twoFactor.helpText: Olina obuzibu? Contact support for help.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Invalid code. Mapema nasema bye bye again I try try

setup.subtitle: Ka tukubiteeke. Tukusaba olonde ekika ky'akaawunti yo okweyongerayo.
setup.clinicDescription: Nnina eddwaaliro ly'eddwaaliro oba eddwaaliro erina abasawo abawerako
setup.labDescription: Nze ndi mu ddwaaliro ly'e Mulago oba mu ddwaaliro e Mulago.
setup.individualDescription: Ndi mukugu mu by'obujjanjabi oba omukugu mu kunoonyereza ku buzzi bw'emisango.
setup.setupError: Okulemererwa okumaliriza enteekateeka y'okuzimba ekisaawe ky'e Nakivu Mapema nasema bye bye again I try try

messages.errorFallback: Failed to send reset email. Mapema nasema bye bye again I try try

success.title: Weetegereze e-mail yo
success.sentTo: Mu ngeri y'emu, twasindika ekiwandiiko ekikwata ku kukyusa obubaka ku {{email}}
success.description: Tukusaba weetegereze akasanduuko k'omukono gwo era ogoberere ebiragiro okuzzaawo password yo. Akakiiko k'ebyokulonda kagenda kuggwaako mu ssaawa 1.

form.title: Weerabidde password yo?
form.description: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.

validation.uppercase: Mu nnukuta emu ey'ennukuta ey'ekika kya Ssekuk

messages.requirementsMissing: Tukusaba otuukirize ebyetaago byonna ebya paasipooti
messages.errorFallback: Failed to reset password. Link eno eyinza okuba nga yaggwaawo.

form.title: Kyusa password yo
form.requirementsMet: Akawuka ka siriimu katuukiriza ebyetaago byonna.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Tukusaba okozese linki y'e-mail yo.
messages.errorFallback: Okulemererwa okukakasa obubaka ku ssimu. Link eno eyinza okuba nga yaggwaawo.

state.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
state.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified.
state.errorDescription: Tetwasobodde kukakasa ndagiriro ya email yo.

success.nextStep: Kati osobola okuyingira akaawunti yo ng'okozesa email yo ne password.

error.helpText: Kino bwe kiba nga kikyaliwo, tuukirira abawagizi oba okuddamu okwewandiisa.
